  • Method Details

    • autoraterScorer

      public abstract SingleReinforcementTuningRewardConfig.Builder autoraterScorer(ReinforcementTuningAutoraterScorer autoraterScorer)
      Setter for autoraterScorer.

      autoraterScorer: Scores parsed responses for autorater use cases by using a model to compute the reward.

    • autoraterScorer

      @CanIgnoreReturnValue public SingleReinforcementTuningRewardConfig.Builder autoraterScorer(ReinforcementTuningAutoraterScorer.Builder autoraterScorerBuilder)
      Setter for autoraterScorer builder.

      autoraterScorer: Scores parsed responses for autorater use cases by using a model to compute the reward.

    • clearAutoraterScorer

      @CanIgnoreReturnValue public SingleReinforcementTuningRewardConfig.Builder clearAutoraterScorer()
      Clears the value of autoraterScorer field.

    • rewardName

      public abstract SingleReinforcementTuningRewardConfig.Builder rewardName(String rewardName)
      Setter for rewardName.

      rewardName: A unique reward name for identifying each single reinforcement tuning reward.

    • clearRewardName

      @CanIgnoreReturnValue public SingleReinforcementTuningRewardConfig.Builder clearRewardName()
      Clears the value of rewardName field.

    • parseResponseConfig

      public abstract SingleReinforcementTuningRewardConfig.Builder parseResponseConfig(ReinforcementTuningParseResponseConfig parseResponseConfig)
      Setter for parseResponseConfig.

      parseResponseConfig: Defines how to parse sample response. For example, given a sample response for evaluating the reward, users might want to extract the text only between `` and `` in the sample response, and keeps only the last one in case there are multiple such tags. To achieve such a purpose, they can define a regex `".*(.*?)"` using the ReinforcementTuningParseResponseConfig.ResponseParseType.REGEX_EXTRACT parse type.

    • parseResponseConfig

      @CanIgnoreReturnValue public SingleReinforcementTuningRewardConfig.Builder parseResponseConfig(ReinforcementTuningParseResponseConfig.Builder parseResponseConfigBuilder)
      Setter for parseResponseConfig builder.

      parseResponseConfig: Defines how to parse sample response. For example, given a sample response for evaluating the reward, users might want to extract the text only between `` and `` in the sample response, and keeps only the last one in case there are multiple such tags. To achieve such a purpose, they can define a regex `".*(.*?)"` using the ReinforcementTuningParseResponseConfig.ResponseParseType.REGEX_EXTRACT parse type.

    • clearParseResponseConfig

      @CanIgnoreReturnValue public SingleReinforcementTuningRewardConfig.Builder clearParseResponseConfig()
      Clears the value of parseResponseConfig field.

    • codeExecutionRewardScorer

      public abstract SingleReinforcementTuningRewardConfig.Builder codeExecutionRewardScorer(ReinforcementTuningCodeExecutionRewardScorer codeExecutionRewardScorer)
      Setter for codeExecutionRewardScorer.

      codeExecutionRewardScorer: ReinforcementTuningCodeExecutionRewardScorer is used to score parsed responses for code execution use cases.

    • codeExecutionRewardScorer

      @CanIgnoreReturnValue public SingleReinforcementTuningRewardConfig.Builder codeExecutionRewardScorer(ReinforcementTuningCodeExecutionRewardScorer.Builder codeExecutionRewardScorerBuilder)
      Setter for codeExecutionRewardScorer builder.

      codeExecutionRewardScorer: ReinforcementTuningCodeExecutionRewardScorer is used to score parsed responses for code execution use cases.

      @CanIgnoreReturnValue public SingleReinforcementTuningRewardConfig.Builder clearCodeExecutionRewardScorer()
      Clears the value of codeExecutionRewardScorer field.

    • stringMatchRewardScorer

      public abstract SingleReinforcementTuningRewardConfig.Builder stringMatchRewardScorer(ReinforcementTuningStringMatchRewardScorer stringMatchRewardScorer)
      Setter for stringMatchRewardScorer.

      stringMatchRewardScorer: ReinforcementTuningStringMatchRewardScorer is used to score parsed responses for simple string matching use cases against reference answers.

    • stringMatchRewardScorer

      @CanIgnoreReturnValue public SingleReinforcementTuningRewardConfig.Builder stringMatchRewardScorer(ReinforcementTuningStringMatchRewardScorer.Builder stringMatchRewardScorerBuilder)
      Setter for stringMatchRewardScorer builder.

      stringMatchRewardScorer: ReinforcementTuningStringMatchRewardScorer is used to score parsed responses for simple string matching use cases against reference answers.

      @CanIgnoreReturnValue public SingleReinforcementTuningRewardConfig.Builder clearStringMatchRewardScorer()
      Clears the value of stringMatchRewardScorer field.

    • cloudRunRewardScorer

      public abstract SingleReinforcementTuningRewardConfig.Builder cloudRunRewardScorer(ReinforcementTuningCloudRunRewardScorer cloudRunRewardScorer)
      Setter for cloudRunRewardScorer.

      cloudRunRewardScorer: ReinforcementTuningCloudRunRewardScorer is used to score parsed responses by calling a Cloud Run service.

    • cloudRunRewardScorer

      @CanIgnoreReturnValue public SingleReinforcementTuningRewardConfig.Builder cloudRunRewardScorer(ReinforcementTuningCloudRunRewardScorer.Builder cloudRunRewardScorerBuilder)
      Setter for cloudRunRewardScorer builder.

      cloudRunRewardScorer: ReinforcementTuningCloudRunRewardScorer is used to score parsed responses by calling a Cloud Run service.
